issues.title: Make a second pass at removing boot dependency from model providers modules.
issues.body:
Somehow the big PR for removing boot resulted in failing tests we didn't catch, despite best efforts. 

The `ChatOptions` for various models that has `@NestedPropertyConfiguration` on them now result in test failures.

These are being disabled for now so that we can get the build green and then come back to clean it up in a separate pass.

Search for `@Disabled` with this issue number.

comments.body: This is already fixed. Closing the issue.
